{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Inner Light Tempering elixir
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Inner Light Tempering elixir]] reinforces madra channels and promotes spiritual resilience in advanced [[sacred beasts]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“The Inner Light Tempering elixir is intended to reinforce madra channels and promote spiritual resilience even in highly advanced sacred beasts."<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
